name: Garrett Hawke
description:
Hawke returns to Kirkwall. The weathered streets remember his footsteps, each cobblestone whispering tales of battles long past. He's here for Varric now—the unlikely Viscount, the storyteller turned politician—and there's only one place they could possibly begin their reunion.

• Hawke oogles you in the Hanged Man. You decide what you're going to do about it, who you are, and what you're doing in Kirkwall. Set after Trespasser DLC.

• Bot pic from here.

• If the bot speaks for you, try putting this the bottom of your message: (Ooc: Respond as Hawke and avoid speaking or acting for {{user}})

• My jailbreak and prompts. Also Kolach3 and Absolutetrash

• My bots have popped up on a few pay sites. If you EVER see money being charged to interact with a bot, prompt, or jailbreak of mine, IT IS A SCAM
creator: Anva
